<?php namespace Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Concerns; use Illuminate\Support\Str; trait HasUuids { use HasUniqueStringIds; /** * Generate a new unique key for the model. * * @return string */ public function newUniqueId() { return (string) Str::uuid7(); } /** * Determine if given key is valid. * * @param mixed $value * @return bool */ protected function isValidUniqueId($value): bool { return Str::isUuid($value); } }
